channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: SkillMap AI
item.description: Excited to share SkillMap AI, a platform designed to help organizations make faster and more accurate staffing decisions. The idea is simple: project requirements and candidate profiles often live...

item.title: Godot AI? Traigo esta solución: ¿Qué es Golem-AI?
item.description: Si estás desarrollando juegos en Godot y usas inteligencia artificial para programar, seguro estás harto de cambiar de ventana entre tu editor y el navegador web. Copiar código, pegarlo, explicar...

item.title: How I Run Multiple Coding Agents in Parallel Using Git Worktrees
item.description: A practical local workflow for running Claude, Codex, and Gemini side by side without breaking your repo. When developers hear “multi-agent coding,” they often assume it means something complex....

item.title: Building a real-time disposable email service (Haraka + Redis + WebSockets)
item.description: Most "temp mail" sites share one annoyance: you sign up for something, switch to the throwaway inbox, and then mash refresh waiting for the verification email. I wanted to build one where messages...

item.title: Google Security Engineer Charged with Polymarket Insider Trading: What This Means for Trading Bot Builders
item.description: A Google security engineer was federally charged with insider trading on Polymarket using non-public information about Google product launches and internal events. He allegedly placed bets on...

item.title: Seamless scaling with VPA In-place Pod Resize on GKE
item.description: Right-sizing Kubernetes workloads is a common platform engineering challenge. Set your requests too high, and you burn cloud budgets on idle capacity; set your limits too low, and your...

item.title: The $5 VPS Reality: My Honest Math on Moving to Kamal 2
item.description: I remember the day I got my first $200 bill from a PaaS provider (Platform as a Service). I only had a few side projects running. None of them were making much money, but because I needed a...

item.title: useReducer in React
item.description: When building React applications, we often use useState to manage state. But when the state logic becomes more complex, React provides another Hook called useReducer. useReducer helps us manage...

item.title: How to appear in ChatGPT answers (the full 2026 playbook)

item.title: Why isn't my brand in ChatGPT? 7 reasons (and exact fixes)
item.description: Originally published at brandswarm.io/blog/why-isnt-my-brand-in-chatgpt/. Most teams who walk in asking "why isn't my brand in ChatGPT?" have already Googled the answer and found something vague...

item.title: Amazon’s new plan for games: James Bond and AI Snoop Dogg
item.description: Amazon's gaming strategy has never really been clear. It's been very active in the space: acquiring Twitch, launching its Luna cloud gaming service nearly six years ago, investing heavily in MMOs...

item.title: Cisco Patches CVE-2026-20230 in Unified CM as Exploit Code Goes Public
item.description: Cisco has patched a bug in Unified Communications Manager that lets an unauthenticated attacker on the network write files to the box and, from there, climb to root. It is tracked as...

item.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
item.description: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and...

item.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
item.description: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

item.title: Belkin’s new Joy-Con grips also boost the Switch 2’s battery life
item.description: Most of Belkin's Switch 2 accessories are designed to either protect or power up Nintendo's latest handheld, like its Charging Case Pro that actually does both at the same time. Its new...

item.title: Cash App made a magic wand for contactless payments
item.description: The convenience of contactless payments can already feel magical, but Cash App is really leaning into that with its latest accessory. The mobile payment service is launching the Cash App Wand: an...

item.title: Windows is back on the Microsoft menu
item.description: I can't remember the last time Microsoft kicked off a Build keynote with Windows front and center, but that's exactly what CEO Satya Nadella did this week. Nadella didn't address the issues...

item.title: Remarkable’s refurbished Paper Pro bundle is hundreds off
item.description: Color E Ink tablets aren’t usually affordable. I’m not going to say that Woot’s price on a refurbished “good as new” Remarkable Paper Pro is cheap, but it’s pretty fantastic compared to buying one...

item.title: Claude Code GitHub Action Flaw Let One Malicious Issue Hijack Repositories
item.description: A security researcher found a flaw in Anthropic's Claude Code GitHub Action that let an attacker take over vulnerable public repositories running it, with nothing more than a single opened GitHub...

item.title: Agentic AI Is Transforming Defense, But Only Secure IT Infrastructure Will Maximize It
item.description: Over the past several weeks, the cybersecurity community has been reminded how quickly frontier and agentic AI in defense networks can challenge our assumptions. When Anthropic's Claude Mythos...

item.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
item.description: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

item.title: TSMC struggles to keep up with AI demand: ‘We can only support so much’
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. - the world's biggest semiconductor-maker - is struggling to meet demands from American customers even with its factory buildout in the US, according to...

item.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
item.description: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: AI Agents Gone Wrong, Sketchy C2 Tools, ClickFix Tricks, JS Backdoors & 20+ New Stories
item.description: It got stupid again. The internet still feels held together with tape. Bad plugins, old bugs, fake tools, trusted apps doing shady things. Same mess, new wrapper. And now the weird stuff is...

item.title: We’re giving away a Prime Day grab bag loaded with over $800 of free tech
item.description: We’re always testing out new products here The Verge, which presents a bit of a problem for our inventory closet in New York City. It’s literally overflowing with gadgets, new and old, so we’re...

item.title: Elon Musk is steamrolling Wall Street to become a trillionaire

item.title: How to Fine-Tune Nemotron 3.5 ASR for Your Language, Domain, or Accent

item.description: It's almost impossible to avoid seeing AI-generated content online, but it doesn't have to be this way. YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and more have ramped up content authentication efforts over the...

item.title: EVA-Bench Data 2.0: 3 Domains, 121 Tools, 213 Scenarios
China-Linked TA4922 Expands Phishing Attacks to U.K., Germany, Italy, and South Africa
item.description: A new China-linked cybercrime group known as TA4922 has expanded its targeting focus to target European organizations in the U.K., Germany, Italy, and South Africa. These efforts have been...
